sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: CATERPILLAR INC는 2025-09-30 분기에 매출 176억 3,800만 달러를 기록했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 핵심 손익은 매출 176억 3,800만 달러, 영업이익 30억 5,200만 달러, 순이익 22억 9,900만 달러다.

riskChanges.text: 따라서 이번 분기는 위험요인 자체를 재정의하기보다 기존 연차공시 프레임을 그대로 계승한 형태로 읽을 수 있다.

businessChanges.text: 매출 증가는 sales volume +1,554에 기인했으며, 당사 설명에 따르면 장비를 end users에게 더 많이 판매한 데서 비롯됐다.
세그먼트 내에서는 Machinery, Energy & Transportation가 16,726으로 15,231 대비 10% 증가해 성장 기여도가 가장 컸다.
Corporate Items and Eliminations은 -1,614로 잡혀, 세그먼트 상승분이 순매출에 그대로 반영되지 않는 상쇄 요인이 존재한다.

financialHighlights.text: 핵심 손익은 매출 176억 3,800만 달러, 영업이익 30억 5,200만 달러, 순이익 22억 9,900만 달러다.
총자산은 937억 2,200만 달러, 현금및현금성자산은 75억 3,800만 달러로 나타났고, 별도 지표로 enterprise cash 7.5 billion이 보고됐다.

watchItems.text: 에너지·운송 부문의 성장률 17%가 두드러지는 반면, Construction Industries의 price realization (262), Resource의 price realization (61)처럼 가격항목은 일부 구간에서 부정적이어서 세그먼트별 가격 압력 추적이 필요하다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: Quarter ended 2025-09-30 revenue = 176억 3,800만 달러 (USD 17.638B; 17,638 million), XBRL range 2025-07-01..2025-09-30.
Quarter ended 2025-09-30 operating income = 30억 5,200만 달러 (USD 3.052B; 3,052 million), XBRL range 2025-07-01..2025-09-30.
Quarter ended 2025-09-30 net income = 22억 9,900만 달러 (USD 2.299B; 2,299 million), XBRL range 2025-07-01..2025-09-30.
Quarter ended 2025-09-30 total assets = 937억 2,200만 달러 (USD 93.722B; 93,722 million), XBRL range instant..2025-09-30.
Quarter ended 2025-09-30 cash and cash equivalents = 75억 3,800만 달러 (USD 7.538B; 7,538 million), XBRL range instant..2025-09-30.
Item 1A. Risk Factors There have been no material changes to the risk factors we previously disclosed in our Annual Report on Form 10-K for the year ended December 31, 2024. <div

Highlights for the third quarter of 2025 include: • Total sales and revenues for the third quarter of 2025 were $17.638 billion, an increase of $1.532 billion, or 10 percent, compared with $16.106 billion in the third quarter of 2024. Sales were higher across the three primary segments. • Operating profit margin was 17.3 percent for the third quarter of 2025, compared with 19.5 percent for the third quarter of 2024. Adjusted operating profit margin was 17.5 percent for the third quarter of 2025, compared with 20.0 percent for the third quarter of 2024. • Third-quarter 2025 profit per share was $4.88, and excluding the items in the table below, adjusted profit per share was $4.95. Third-quarter 2024 profit per share was $5.06, and excluding the items in the table below, adjusted profit per share was $5.17. • Caterpillar ended the third quarter of 2025 with $7.5 billion of enterprise cash. Readable Korean unit: 176억 3,800만 달러, 15억 3,200만 달러, 161억 600만 달러, 75억 달러.

Overview: Q3 2025 total sales and revenues were $17.638 billion (176억 3,800만 달러), up $1.532 billion (15억 3,200만 달러) or 10% from $16.106 billion (161억 600만 달러) in Q3 2024. The increase was primarily due to higher sales volume of $1.554 billion (15억 5,400만 달러). Profit per share was $4.88 versus $5.06. Profit was $2.300 billion (23억 달러), down $164 million (1억 6,400만 달러) or 7% from $2.464 billion (24억 6,400만 달러).
